## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CircleArrowOutDownLeft;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CircleArrowOutDownLeft { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
outwards, direction, south-west, diagonal

## Categories
arrows
